title: calea ternifolia var. calyculata
intro: Calea ternifolia var. calyculata, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Calea ternifolia var. calyculata include potential relief from anxiety and insomnia, improved mood, and increased libido, as well as its traditional use in treating various female health issues. Calea ternifolia var. calyculata is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal supplements and traditional medicine.
